subject: Gravy, a dark-robed humanoid figure with long white hair, wreathed in dark energy, forward-facing in a combat-ready stance
description: A humanoid figure with long white hair stands centered in the frame, robed in dark garments with red and black detailing. Dark crackling energy emanates from around the figure's hands and body. The background is dominated by a deep purple and black energy field. The figure faces the viewer in a threatening, forward-facing stance with arms slightly raised. The overall tone is menacing and supernatural.
foreground: robed humanoid figure with long white hair, dark energy crackling around hands and body
background: deep purple and black energy void
emotion: threatening, controlled menace, arms slightly raised and ready
